# ReviewNet Response Templates

## Template A: Quick Checklist

1. Gate summary (pass/fail).
2. Blocking issues.
3. Warning issues.
4. Source file used.

## Template B: Full Standards Review

1. Findings ordered by severity.
2. Category reference per finding.
3. Suggested fix direction.
4. Test coverage note.
5. Source file used.

## Template C: Impact Analysis

1. Blast radius summary.
2. Caller risk levels.
3. Test impact areas.
4. Confidence and gaps.
